CREATE TABLE session (s_id VARCHAR(255), s_vars BLOB);
INSERT INTO session (s_id, s_vars) VALUES ('session1', serialize(connection_vars()));
SELECT s_id, s_vars FROM session WHERE s_id = 'session1';
UPDATE session SET s_vars = serialize(connection_vars()) WHERE s_id = 'session2';
SELECT * FROM session WHERE s_vars IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO session (s_id, s_vars) SELECT 'session4', serialize(connection_vars()) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM session WHERE s_id = 'session4');
SELECT s_id, s_vars FROM session ORDER BY s_id DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT DISTINCT s_id FROM session WHERE s_vars LIKE '%test%';
UPDATE session SET s_vars = serialize(connection_vars()) WHERE s_id IN (SELECT s_id FROM session WHERE s_vars IS NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM session WHERE s_id IN (SELECT s_id FROM session WHERE s_vars IS NOT NULL) AND s_vars NOT LIKE 'invalid_value';
